Itinerary.title: 1-Day Tokyo Highlights
Itinerary.summary: A single-day route covering Shibuya, Harajuku/Meiji Shrine, Asakusa, Ueno, and an evening skyline view, with suggested transit and meals for smooth pacing.

Day.theme: Central Tokyo highlights with walking and short trains

POI.name: Shibuya Crossing & Hachiko
POI.description: Start at Shibuya to experience the famous scramble crossing and the Hachiko statue nearby.

Transit.name: Train to Harajuku (JR Yamanote)
Transit.description: Short JR ride from Shibuya to Harajuku station.

highlights.highlight: Arrive near Meiji Shrine and Takeshita Street

POI.name: Meiji Shrine & Yoyogi Park
POI.description: Peaceful walk through the forested approach and visit the shrine grounds.

POI.name: Takeshita Street (Harajuku)
POI.description: Explore youthful fashion shops and crepe stands along the bustling pedestrian street.

Meal.name: Lunch in Omotesando/Harajuku
Meal.description: Choose a casual sushi spot, ramen, or a trendy cafe along Omotesando.

Transit.name: Train to Asakusa (Ginza Line transfer)
Transit.description: Change lines to head northeast to Asakusa for traditional Tokyo sights.

highlights.highlight: About 25-40 minutes depending on transfer speed

POI.name: Senso-ji Temple & Nakamise
POI.description: Visit Tokyo's oldest temple and browse the Nakamise shopping street for snacks and souvenirs.

Transit.name: Short train to Ueno
Transit.description: Quick ride to Ueno for park and cultural stops.

POI.name: Ueno Park & Ameyoko Market
POI.description: Stroll the park, visit a museum if desired, and explore the lively Ameya-Yokocho market.

Transit.name: Train to Tokyo Skytree area
Transit.description: Head east to the Sumida district for evening skyline views.

POI.name: Tokyo Skytree / Sumida Riverside
POI.description: Optional observation deck visit or riverside walk to view the tower at golden hour.

Meal.name: Dinner near Skytree or Asakusa
Meal.description: Finish with a relaxed dinner: traditional izakaya, tempura, or modern dining with tower views.
